description: Analyze the active site of the plastic-degrading enzyme IsPETase (PDB: 6EQE). Load the structure, locate the catalytic triad (Ser160, Asp206, His237) and the adjacent 'wobbling' tryptophan residue (Trp185). Measure the hydrogen-bond distance between the nucleophilic Ser160 side-chain oxygen (OG) and the general base His237 side-chain nitrogen (NE2). Create a publication-quality figure highlighting these four residues in the active site cleft as sticks and the backbone as cartoon, and save it to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/petase_active_site.png. Write a structural report to ~/PyMOL_Data/petase_report.txt that includes the PDB ID (6EQE), lists the three catalytic triad residues, identifies the wobbling Trp185, and reports the measured Ser160-His237 distance in Angstroms.
